title: Midgame Escalation And Theory Shift
objective: Make the middle game reframe the player's working theories instead of simply extending investigation.
storyQuestions: What causes the player's current leading theory to wobble or mutate?
Where does the thriller escalate from clue gathering to accusation risk or exposure risk?
What changes after the midpoint besides more content?
baseAcceptanceChecks: The touched midgame span forces at least one serious theory revision.
Escalation introduces new pressure, not just additional exposition.
